# - OilPrice: Relative regional exposure to oil price shocks (0-1 scale)
# - GasPrice: Relative regional exposure to natural gas price shocks (0-1 scale)
# - GDP: Relative regional macroeconomic sensitivity (0-1 scale)
# - HeatIndex: Relative regional heat stress exposure (0-1 scale)
# - FloodRisk: Relative regional flood hazard propensity (0-1 scale)
# - DroughtRisk: Relative regional drought propensity (0-1 scale)
# - CarbonPrice: Policy stringency and likelihood of carbon pricing
#   * Low (0.0-0.4): Middle East & Africa (weak carbon pricing)
#   * High oil: Middle East & Africa (producer economies
# - GDP: Economic volatility and structural vulnerability

# - Energy mix: IEA World Energy Outlook
# - GDP volatility: World Bank development indicators

# - Expert review by regional economists and climate scientists
# - Sensitivity analysis: Vary regional scores ±30% and check portfolio impact
# - Historical validation: Check alignment with past regional climate impacts
# - "Global" region: Use portfolio-weighted average for multinational corporations
# - Regional heterogeneity: These are regional averages; country-level variation exists
# - Temporal dynamics: Physical risk scores increase over time (should be time-dependent in future versions)
